start.text: Captain. Cryo maintenance cycle complete. All pods functional. Sleep efficiency 97.3 percent. Note: crew member Tove has left her boots in pod two again. Retrieval protocol engaged. The Loup-Garou is ready for transit whenever transit is required.

choices.text: You always use her full name. The ship's.

full_name.text: Affirmative. Designations are load-bearing. The crew shortens the name because the name is theirs to shorten. I maintain the pods that keep the crew alive inside the Loup-Garou; precision in small protocols predicts precision in critical ones. Also — and I file this observation under 'ambiguous' — I believe the ship prefers it.

acknowledged.text: Acknowledged. Filing under: crew relations — successful.
